title: BreakReflection
description: BreakReflection is a modpack that combines dungeon fighting, world exploration, and survival parenting.
body:
![Modpacks in the making.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e9398c518007e12ac199cbf1b9d8fe546a5714a.png)

**Hi, everyone!**

We are making a interesting modpack! 

This is a modpack that _combines dungeon fighting_, _world exploration_, and _survival parenting_.

We will be completing it in the next few years, **so stay tuned!**
